data.body:
## Description

Modify `tests/scripts/test-ticket-create.sh` to add 4 new tests verifying the `--description`/`-d` flag:

- Test 11: `--description="body"` populates `data.description` in CREATE event JSON
- Test 12: `-d "body"` populates `data.description` in CREATE event JSON
- Test 13: No `-d` flag leaves description as empty string in CREATE event
- Test 14: `ticket show` after `ticket create -d` includes `description` in compiled JSON output

Test approach: Create a ticket with -d, read the CREATE event JSON file via python3, assert `data.description` equals provided value. For Test 14, call `ticket show` via the reducer and verify `description` appears in the compiled output.

RED gate: After adding tests, run `bash tests/scripts/test-ticket-create.sh` and confirm new tests FAIL.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: tests/scripts/test-ticket-create.sh

## TDD Requirement
Tests must FAIL (RED) before Task 2 implementation.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] `ruff check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] `ruff format --check` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: ruff format --check $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/*.py $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/**/*.py
- [ ] 4 new test functions added to test-ticket-create.sh
  Verify: grep -c 'test_ticket_create.*description' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-create.sh
- [ ] New tests FAIL (RED) before Task 2 implementation
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-ticket-create.sh 2>&1 | tail -5
